title: Fix stopped backend canister causing IC0508 rejection errors

requirements.text: Redeploy the backend Motoko canister so it transitions from a stopped state to a running state. The canister tgggy-siaaa-aaaag-auegq-cai is currently stopped (IC0508 / Reject code 5), causing all calls including getAllIncidents to be rejected. The canister must be fully redeployed and running so that both query and update calls are accepted without error.

quotes: Canister tgggy-siaaa-aaaag-auegq-cai is stopped and therefore does not have a CallContextManager Error code: IC0508
Reject code: 5 Reject text: Canister tgggy-siaaa-aaaag-auegq-cai is stopped

acceptanceCriteria: The backend canister is in a running state after deployment.
Calls to getAllIncidents return incident data without a Reject code 5 / IC0508 error.
The Dashboard and Admin Panel load incidents successfully without any 'canister is stopped' rejection errors.
Both query and update calls (createIncident, addUpdate, changeStatus, deleteIncident) are accepted by the canister.

constraints: Do not change the existing backend data model or Motoko actor logic.
Do not modify any frontend immutable paths.
nonGoals: Changing the frontend actor initialization or query wiring.
Adding new backend methods or modifying existing ones.
